    55→    pub system_channels: u8,
    56→    /// Sample rate of the system audio recording.
    57→    pub system_sample_rate: u32,
    58→}
    59→
    60→/// Who spoke a given transcript segment.
    61→#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
    62→pub enum SpeakerLabel {
    63→    Therapist,
    64→    Client,
    65→    ClientA,
    66→    ClientB,
    67→    Unknown,
    68→}
    69→
    70→/// Whether the session is a 1:1 (therapist + one client) or couples session
    71→/// (therapist + two clients). Controls which pipeline stages run.
    72→#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
    73→pub enum SessionMode {
    74→    OneToOne,
    75→    Couples,
    76→}
    77→
    78→/// A single speaker turn in the transcript.
    79→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    80→pub struct TranscriptSegment {
    81→    pub speaker: SpeakerLabel,
    82→    pub start_seconds: f64,
    83→    pub end_seconds: f64,
    84→    pub text: String,
    85→}
    86→
    87→/// The complete transcript for one session.
    88→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    89→pub struct TranscriptResult {
    90→    pub session_id: String,
    91→    pub session_mode: SessionMode,
    92→    pub segments: Vec<TranscriptSegment>,
    93→}
    94→
    95→// ── Namespace functions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    96→
    97→/// Returns the pablo-core crate version. Used by Swift to confirm FFI is wired.
    98→pub fn core_version() -> String {
    99→    env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION").to_string()
   100→}
   101→
   102→/// Audio preprocessing: raw PCM (signed 16-bit LE) -> mono f32 at 16 kHz.
   103→/// `sample_rate` is the actual input rate (e.g. 48000 built-in, 16000 Bluetooth HFP).
   104→pub async fn preprocess_pcm(
   105→    path: String,
   106→    channels: u8,
   107→    sample_rate: u32,
   108→) -> Result<Vec<f32>, PabloError> {
   109→    audio_preprocessing::preprocess_pcm(path, channels, sample_rate).await
   110→}
   111→
   112→/// Render a TranscriptResult to Google Meet plain-text format.
   113→/// The resulting string is what the Pablo SOAP note pipeline expects.
   114→pub fn render_google_meet(transcript: TranscriptResult, opts: GoogleMeetOptions) -> String {
   115→    google_meet_renderer::render_google_meet(&transcript, &opts)
   116→}
   117→
   118→/// 1:1 session transcription pipeline.
   119→/// Preprocesses and transcribes mic and (optionally) system audio files,
   120→/// labels segments THERAPIST / CLIENT, merges by start time, returns TranscriptResult.
   121→pub async fn transcribe_session_1on1(
   122→    session_id: String,
   123→    mic_path: String,
   124→    system_path: Option<String>,
   125→    config: TranscriptionConfig,
   126→) -> Result<TranscriptResult, PabloError> {
   127→    session_pipeline::transcribe_session_1on1(session_id, mic_path, system_path, config).await
   128→}
   129→
   130→/// Transcribe 16 kHz mono f32 audio using the GGML Whisper model at `model_path`.
   131→/// Returns one `RawSegment` per sentence segment, ordered by start time.
   132→/// Fixed params: language=en, token_timestamps=true, beam_size=5.
   133→pub async fn transcribe_audio(
   134→    model_path: String,
   135→    audio: Vec<f32>,
   136→) -> Result<Vec<RawSegment>, PabloError> {
   137→    whisper_transcriber::transcribe_audio(model_path, audio).await
   138→}
   139→
   140→// ── Tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   141→
   142→#[cfg(test)]
   143→mod tests {
   144→    use super::*;
   145→
   146→    #[test]
   147→    fn core_version_is_semver() {
   148→        let v = core_version();
   149→        // Verify it looks like a semver string (at least "major.minor.patch")
   150→        let parts: Vec<&str> = v.split('.').collect();
   151→        assert!(parts.len() >= 3, "expected semver, got: {v}");
   152→    }
   153→
   154→    #[test]
   155→    fn transcript_result_roundtrip() {
   156→        let result = TranscriptResult {
   157→            session_id: "session-123".to_string(),
   158→            session_mode: SessionMode::OneToOne,
   159→            segments: vec![
   160→                TranscriptSegment {
   161→                    speaker: SpeakerLabel::Therapist,
   162→                    start_seconds: 0.0,
   163→                    end_seconds: 2.5,
   164→                    text: "How are you feeling today?".to_string(),
   165→                },
   166→                TranscriptSegment {
   167→                    speaker: SpeakerLabel::Client,
   168→                    start_seconds: 3.1,
   169→                    end_seconds: 6.0,
   170→                    text: "Better than last week.".to_string(),
   171→                },
   172→            ],
   173→        };
   174→
   175→        assert_eq!(result.segments.len(), 2);
   176→        assert_eq!(result.segments[0].speaker, SpeakerLabel::Therapist);
   177→        assert_eq!(result.segments[1].speaker, SpeakerLabel::Client);
   178→        assert_eq!(result.session_mode, SessionMode::OneToOne);
   179→    }
   180→}
